finding: apps/aiostreams 30d workload-peak 974m vs CPU limit 1.00 cores (97%) — rides close to its limit — may throttle on an unsampled burst
fix: raise limits.cpu (or remove it) in its manifest

finding: apps/stremthru-postgres 30d workload-peak 986m vs CPU limit 1.00 cores (99%) — rides close to its limit — may throttle on an unsampled burst
fix: raise limits.cpu (or remove it) in its manifest

finding: apps/zilean-postgres 30d workload-peak 951m vs CPU limit 1.00 cores (95%) — rides close to its limit — may throttle on an unsampled burst
fix: raise limits.cpu (or remove it) in its manifest

finding: observability/grafana 30d workload-peak 1.47 cores vs CPU limit 1.60 cores (92%) — rides close to its limit — may throttle on an unsampled burst
fix: raise limits.cpu (or remove it) in its manifest

finding: apps: 0/33 pods Guaranteed (Burstable=33) — under memory pressure Burstable pods are OOM-ranked by usage-over-request (the under-request cohort dies first)
fix: raise requests toward usage (finding 3) to improve OOM survival; request==limit for the few critical workloads makes them Guaranteed

finding: observability: 0/9 pods Guaranteed (Burstable=9) — under memory pressure Burstable pods are OOM-ranked by usage-over-request (the under-request cohort dies first)
fix: raise requests toward usage (finding 3) to improve OOM survival; request==limit for the few critical workloads makes them Guaranteed

finding: apps: 2/34 containers don't enforce runAsNonRoot (may run as root)
fix: set runAsNonRoot: true / a non-zero runAsUser where the image allows

finding: apps: 32/34 containers have a writable root filesystem
fix: set securityContext.readOnlyRootFilesystem: true (+ emptyDir/volume for writable paths) where the image allows

finding: observability: 8/12 containers have a writable root filesystem
fix: set securityContext.readOnlyRootFilesystem: true (+ emptyDir/volume for writable paths) where the image allows

finding: observability: 1/12 containers don't set a seccompProfile (RuntimeDefault) — syscall surface unconfined
fix: set securityContext.seccompProfile.type: RuntimeDefault where the image allows

finding: /opt/docker/data/bitmagnet/db — node-local hostPath (apps/bitmagnet-postgres-c966c5cd7-7vsgn), no PV lifecycle/reclaim guard; an ArgoCD prune or path rename orphans the data
fix: confirm /opt/docker/data/bitmagnet/db is in the off-node backup set (see gitops/RESTORE.md); consider migrating to a local-path-retain PVC
